name: CAMPESINO CHARDONNAY GRAN RESERVA
notes: View: The appearance of this wine is a very clear and clean yellow tone.
Nose: Initially mineral with notes of almond, hazelnut and melon, citrus notes lime / lemon, and peach.
Mouth: Moderate acidity, medium structure and short finish.
Pairing: Ideal for seafood and smoked fish, pasta dishes with not very spicy white sauce and vegan food.
description: View: The appearance of this wine is a very clear and clean yellow tone. Nose: Initially mineral with notes of almond, hazelnut and melon, citrus notes lime / lemon, and peach. Mouth: Moderate acidity, medium structure and short finish. Pai
notes_es: Vista: Este vino presenta un tono amarillo muy limpio y brillante.
Nariz: Inicialmente mineral, con notas de almendra, avellana y melón, matices cítricos de lima y limón, y durazno.
Boca: Acidez moderada, estructura media y final corto.
Maridaje: Ideal con mariscos y pescados ahumados, pastas con salsa blanca poco picante y comida vegana.
description_es: Un Chardonnay Gran Reserva de tono amarillo limpio y brillante, mineral en nariz con notas de almendra, avellana, melón y cítricos. En boca, acidez moderada y estructura media.

name: CAMPESINO CARMÉNÈRE
notes: View: Clean wine without sediment and bright (young), has a high layer, deep ruby red color.

Smells: Fruit aromas such as plum and cherries, its aging in barrels provides notes such as chocolate and vanilla, leaving a pleasant aroma before tasting In mouth: This wine has a good structure in the mouth, its tannins are balanced and very rich in acidity.
Pairing: Ideal to accompany red meats of beef, and game meats of intense flavor. It also goes well with mature and penetrating cheeses such as Parmesan, Gruyere and Camembert.
description: View: Clean wine without sediment and bright (young), has a high layer, deep ruby red color. Smells: Fruit aromas such as plum and cherries, its aging in barrels provides notes such as chocolate and vanilla, leaving a pleasant aroma before
notes_es: Vista: Vino limpio, sin sedimentos y brillante (joven), de capa alta y color rojo rubí intenso.

Aromas: Aromas frutales de ciruela y cerezas; su crianza en barrica aporta notas de chocolate y vainilla, dejando un aroma agradable antes de la cata. En boca: buena estructura, taninos equilibrados y una acidez muy rica.
Maridaje: Ideal para acompañar carnes rojas de vacuno y carnes de caza de sabor intenso. También marida bien con quesos maduros y penetrantes como Parmesano, Gruyère y Camembert.
description_es: Un Carménère joven, limpio y de color rojo rubí intenso. En nariz, ciruela y cerezas con notas de chocolate y vainilla de su paso por barrica; en boca, buena estructura y taninos equilibrados.

name: CAMPESINO CABERNET SAUVIGNON RESERVA
notes: View: Clean wine without sediment and bright (young), has a high layer, deep ruby red color.

Smells: Fruit aromas such as plum and cherries, its aging in barrels provides notes such as chocolate and vanilla, leaving a pleasant aroma before tasting In mouth: This wine has a good structure in the mouth, its tannins are balanced and very rich in acidity.
Pairing: Ideal to accompany red meats of beef, and game meats of intense flavor. It also goes well with mature and penetrating cheeses such as Parmesan, Gruyere and Camembert.
description: View: Clean wine without sediment and bright (young), has a high layer, deep ruby red color. Smells: Fruit aromas such as plum and cherries, its aging in barrels provides notes such as chocolate and vanilla, leaving a pleasant aroma before
notes_es: Vista: Vino limpio, sin sedimentos y brillante (joven), de capa alta y color rojo rubí intenso.

Aromas: Aromas frutales de ciruela y cerezas; su crianza en barrica aporta notas de chocolate y vainilla, dejando un aroma agradable antes de la cata. En boca: buena estructura, taninos equilibrados y una acidez muy rica.
Maridaje: Ideal para acompañar carnes rojas de vacuno y carnes de caza de sabor intenso. También marida bien con quesos maduros y penetrantes como Parmesano, Gruyère y Camembert.
description_es: Un Cabernet Sauvignon Reserva de color rojo rubí intenso, con aromas de ciruela y cereza y notas de chocolate y vainilla de barrica. En boca, buena estructura y taninos equilibrados.

name: CAMPESINO CHARDONNAY
notes: View: The appearance of this wine is a very clear and clean yellow tone.

Smell: The first impression on the nose is very fruity, mainly to mangoes, ripe tropical fruits and evolves towards notes of citrus and spices such as cinnamon. In the mouth: In the mouth it has a medium, soft and rich body, which ends with a vibrant acidity that gives it a medium length and palate. The aftertaste evolves towards more oak nuances, like vanilla and toasted.
Pairing: Perfect to accompany delicate fish such as croaker, sole and turbot, grilled with creamy sauces or capers or herbs
description: View: The appearance of this wine is a very clear and clean yellow tone. Smell: The first impression on the nose is very fruity, mainly to mangoes, ripe tropical fruits and evolves towards notes of citrus and spices such as cinnamon. In the
notes_es: Vista: Este vino presenta un tono amarillo muy limpio y brillante.

Nariz: La primera impresión en nariz es muy frutal, principalmente a mango y frutas tropicales maduras, y evoluciona hacia notas cítricas y especias como la canela. En boca: cuerpo medio, suave y rico, que termina con una acidez vibrante de longitud media; el retrogusto evoluciona hacia matices amaderados, como vainilla y tostado.
Maridaje: Perfecto para acompañar pescados delicados como corvina, lenguado y rodaballo, a la parrilla con salsas cremosas, alcaparras o hierbas.
description_es: Un Chardonnay de tono amarillo limpio y brillante, muy frutal en nariz —mango y frutas tropicales— con especias y un final de matices amaderados. Cuerpo medio y acidez vibrante.
